rules.name: Security Missing Evidence Requires Human Review
rules.description: Security incidents with missing evidence must be escalated to human review.

rules.name: Critical Priority Pages On-Call
rules.description: Incidents with priority_score >= 85 must page the on-call owner.

rules.name: Hallucination Risk Requires Human Review
rules.description: Incidents flagged with hallucination risk must be human reviewed.

rules.name: p95 SLA Threshold
rules.description: Benchmark p95 latency threshold is 2500 ms.
